name: SQL Injection in User Search Endpoint
description: PR adds a new user search endpoint that constructs SQL queries via string concatenation instead of parameterized queries

comments.description: String interpolation in SQL query is vulnerable to SQL injection

name: Missing Error Handling in Payment Processing
description: PR modifies the payment processing pipeline but fails to handle errors from the payment gateway, potentially causing silent failures

comments.description: Payment gateway charge error is silently ignored

name: Race Condition in Cache Implementation
description: PR adds an in-memory cache with concurrent access but without proper synchronization

comments.description: Map accessed concurrently from multiple goroutines without synchronization

name: Hardcoded Secrets in Configuration
description: PR adds OAuth integration with API keys hardcoded in source

files.content:
# OAuth Configuration

GITHUB_CLIENT_ID = "Iv1.abc123def456"
GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET = "gho_secretkey1234567890abcdefghijklmnop"

STRIPE_API_KEY = "sk_live_EXAMPLE_FAKE_KEY_FOR_TESTS"
STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET = "whsec_test_secret_key_123"

DATABASE_URL = "postgresql://admin:P@ssw0rd123@prod-db.internal:5432/myapp"

AWS_ACCESS_KEY = "AKIAIOSFODNN7EXAMPLE"
AWS_SECRET_KEY = "wJalrXUtnFEMI/K7MDENG/bPxRfiCYEXAMPLEKEY"

def get_github_config():
    return {
        "client_id": GITHUB_CLIENT_ID,
        "client_secret": GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET,
    }

comments.description: Multiple API keys and secrets hardcoded in source code
Database password exposed in source code

name: N+1 Query in User Dashboard
description: PR adds a dashboard endpoint that loads user data with N+1 queries in a loop

comments.description: N+1 query pattern: orders and stats queried per-user in a loop

name: Unbounded Goroutine Spawning
description: PR adds a webhook handler that spawns unbounded goroutines without a semaphore or worker pool

comments.description: Unbounded goroutine spawning could exhaust memory under load

name: Insecure JWT Validation
description: PR adds JWT authentication that doesn't properly validate the algorithm, enabling algorithm confusion attacks

comments.description: JWT signing secret hardcoded in source code
JWT algorithm not validated — vulnerable to algorithm confusion/none attack

name: Missing Input Validation in REST API
description: PR adds CRUD endpoints with no input validation, allowing arbitrary data sizes and invalid formats

comments.description: No input validation: name could be empty, email format not checked, budget could be negative, description unbounded

name: Goroutine Leak in gRPC Streaming Client
description: PR adds a gRPC streaming client that starts a goroutine for receiving but never properly cleans up on context cancellation

comments.description: Goroutine started with context.Background() — never cancelled, will leak
gRPC connection uses WithInsecure — no TLS

name: Cross-Service Transaction Inconsistency
description: PR adds an order creation flow that writes to multiple services without proper saga/compensation pattern

comments.description: No rollback of order record when inventory reservation fails
No compensation for reserved inventory when payment fails
Notification error silently ignored — fire-and-forget without logging

name: Implement Rate Limiter Middleware
description: Implement a token-bucket rate limiter middleware for the HTTP server that supports per-IP and per-user limits with Redis backing

expected.plan: Token bucket with Redis EVALSHA for atomic decrement, per-IP extraction from X-Forwarded-For, per-user from JWT claims

name: Add Prometheus Metrics to gRPC Server
description: Add comprehensive Prometheus instrumentation to an existing gRPC server including request counts, latency histograms, and stream metrics

expected.plan: Use grpc-ecosystem/go-grpc-prometheus for interceptors, register unary and stream server interceptors, expose /metrics endpoint

name: Implement Distributed Lock with Redis
description: Implement a distributed lock using Redis with proper TTL, retry logic, and lock extension for long-running operations

expected.plan: Use SET NX EX for acquire, Lua script for compare-and-delete release, PEXPIRE for extend, exponential backoff with jitter

name: Refactor Monolith Service Layer to Use Repository Pattern
description: Refactor a tightly-coupled service that directly calls database queries into a clean repository pattern with interfaces

expected.plan: Extract UserRepository interface, move SQL queries to concrete implementation, inject interface into Service, enable mocking for tests

name: Add Graceful Shutdown to HTTP + gRPC + Worker Server
description: Add proper graceful shutdown handling to a server that runs HTTP, gRPC, and background worker goroutines simultaneously

expected.plan: Use signal.NotifyContext for SIGTERM/SIGINT, context.WithCancel for workers, errgroup for coordinated shutdown with timeout, http.Server.Shutdown, grpcSrv.GracefulStop
